hero.headline: Building the Future,
hero.subtitle: A premier multinational company delivering excellence across real estate, technology, energy, and finance — shaping industries and empowering futures worldwide.

about.subtitle: About Us
about.paragraph1: Founded in 2001, NAZERA has grown from a regional investment firm into a diversified multinational conglomerate with operations spanning 30+ countries. Our portfolio encompasses real estate development, technology solutions, renewable energy, financial services, and strategic consulting.
about.paragraph2: We believe in creating lasting value — for our partners, our communities, and the global economy. Every decision we make is guided by integrity, innovation, and an unwavering commitment to excellence.
highlights: Strategic investments across emerging and established markets
End-to-end project delivery with global expertise

services.subtitle: What We Do
services.title: Our Services
services.description: Across five core verticals, we deliver world-class solutions that drive growth, innovation, and sustainable impact worldwide.

items.title: Real Estate Development
items.description: Premium residential, commercial, and mixed-use developments across global markets. From concept to completion, we deliver landmark projects that redefine skylines and communities.

items.title: Technology Solutions
items.description: Cutting-edge IT infrastructure, AI-driven platforms, and digital transformation services that help businesses scale and compete in the digital age.

items.title: Energy & Renewables
items.description: Sustainable energy projects including solar, wind, and hybrid installations. We are committed to powering the future while protecting the planet.

items.title: Financial Services
items.description: Comprehensive financial advisory, asset management, and investment banking services tailored to high-net-worth individuals and institutional investors.

items.title: Strategic Consulting
items.description: Expert advisory services for market entry, mergers & acquisitions, operational optimization, and long-term growth strategy across industries.

items.label: Countries
items.description: With a presence in every major region

portfolio.subtitle: Our Work
portfolio.title: Featured Projects
portfolio.description: A selection of landmark projects that demonstrate our expertise, scale, and commitment to exceptional outcomes.

items.title: Azure Towers Dubai
items.description: A 72-story mixed-use luxury tower featuring 450 premium residences and world-class amenities.

items.title: SmartGrid Platform
items.description: An AI-powered energy management platform deployed across 200+ industrial facilities.

items.title: Sahara Solar Complex
items.description: One of North Africa's largest solar installations, generating 850MW of clean energy.

items.title: Meridian Capital Fund
items.description: A $3.5 billion diversified investment fund focusing on emerging market equities.

items.title: Nexus Business Park
items.description: A 15-acre LEED Platinum business campus housing Fortune 500 tenants.

items.title: CloudForge AI
items.description: Enterprise AI development platform serving over 500 enterprise clients globally.

items.name: Ahmed Al-Rashid
items.text: NAZERA transformed our real estate portfolio strategy. Their market insights and execution capabilities are unmatched in the region.

items.name: Dr. Elena Vasquez
items.text: Their commitment to sustainable energy is genuine. The Sahara Solar Complex is a testament to NAZERA's ability to deliver economically viable and environmentally responsible projects.

items.name: Michael Park
items.text: CloudForge AI has been transformative for our operations. NAZERA's technology division understood our needs at a fundamental level and delivered a platform that scaled beyond expectations.

team.subtitle: Leadership
team.title: Meet Our Team
team.description: Decades of combined experience from the world's top firms, united by a shared vision for sustainable global growth.

items.name: Khalid Al-Nazari
items.bio: Over 30 years of global business leadership. Former senior advisor to sovereign wealth funds across the GCC.

items.name: Sarah Mitchell
items.bio: Ex-McKinsey partner with deep expertise in operational transformation across emerging markets.

items.name: James Chen
items.bio: Serial tech entrepreneur with three successful exits. Pioneer in enterprise AI and cloud architecture.

items.name: Amira Hassan
items.bio: CFA charterholder and former Goldman Sachs MD specializing in cross-border M&A.

contact.subtitle: Contact Us
contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.description: Whether you're exploring a partnership, seeking investment opportunities, or want to learn more — we'd love to hear from you.
